title: DOMIIINO
description:
Set up the dominoes. Just to the goal.

Place wooden dominoes and connect the chain reaction from START to GOAL. Watch the terrain, plan your route, adjust the angle and spacing, then give it one final push and see what happens. A slight misalignment or loss of momentum can stop the chain. If you fail, I recommend leaving it to tomorrow’s self and getting some rest.

The trick is to test in short sections. Keep trying, little by little, and aim for the goal.

With simple controls, you can experience the tension of watching your plan fall apart and the satisfaction of seeing the chain reach the end. What you need is observation, patience, and a little bit of reflex.

• Place wooden dominoes and connect the chain reaction from START to GOAL

• Trial and error as you adjust angles and spacing while reading the terrain

• Simple rules: give it one final push and watch the result

• Reset after failure, review your placement, and try again

• Physics where a slight misalignment or loss of momentum can ruin your plan

• Simple English only
description_short: Set up the dominoes. Just to the goal.
